payload.stdout_excerpt:
Render the agent dispatch prompt server-side from the embedded template. Substitutes every `{placeholder}` it can resolve; warns on stderr for any left unfilled. Stdout = raw prompt string ready for the Task tool (no JSON framing)

Usage: mustard-rt.exe run agent-prompt-render [OPTIONS] --spec <SPEC> --role <ROLE> --subproject <SUBPROJECT>

Options:
      --spec <SPEC>
          Spec slug under `.claude/spec/`
      --wave <WAVE>
          Wave number (0-based, matching `wave-N-*` directories). Omitted for non-wave specs
      --role <ROLE>
          Agent role token (e.g. `ui`, `backend`)
      --subproject <SUBPROJECT>
          Subproject path relative to the project root (e.g. `apps/dashboard`)
      --mode <MODE>
          Render mode: `first` (default), `granular`, `fix-loop` [default: first]
      --retry-context-file <RETRY_CONTEXT_FILE>
          File containing the `{retry_context}` text for granular/fix-loop
      --task-filter <TASK_FILTER>
          Keep only task lines whose content matches this pattern (e.g. `"T0\\.(1|5)"`). Supports literal chars, `\\.` escape, and `(a|b)` alternation. Omit to include all tasks
  -h, --help
          Print help
